sizing_rule.note: For multi-leg positions, calculate optimal f for each mandated exit date using net of position legs at trade inception. Select exit date with greatest geometric mean to determine optimal position sizing. Follows Vince Equation (5.14) methodology.

source_rule_text: For multi-leg positions, calculate optimal f and geometric mean for each potential mandated exit date, then select the exit date with the greatest geometric mean as the optimal exit date for position sizing.
